name: youtube-autopay-bot
description: YouTube Auto Pay Bot by Sindu Saga

scripts.obfuscate: uglifyjs bot.js -o bot.min.js -c -m && echo '✅ Bot berhasil diobfuscate! File: bot.min.js'
scripts.obfuscate:aggressive: uglifyjs bot.js -o bot.min.js -c passes=3 -m --mangle-props keep_quoted && echo '✅ Obfuscate agresif selesai! File: bot.min.js'
scripts.clean: rm -rf TEMP && echo '✅ Folder TEMP dibersihkan'
scripts.preview:
node -e "console.log('📋 Daftar script:
- npm start : Jalankan bot
- npm run headless : Jalankan mode headless
- npm run obfuscate : Obfuscate bot
- npm run prod : Jalankan hasil obfuscate')"

author: Sindu Saga
